rootCause: git blame on frontend/src/utils/gameState.js traced the regression to commit 0969275, where setCurrentDialogueStep and finishQuest overwrite quest progress objects instead of merging fields; this dropped itemsClaimed metadata and re-enabled grantsItems Claim buttons after navigation.
resolution: Preserved existing quest progress fields when updating stepId and finished status so itemsClaimed remains in IndexedDB-backed gameState, and added regression tests that assert claim metadata survives dialogue-step and finish transitions.
